Properties.Globals: "int getFreeSlots() {<nl>  	int results = 49;<nl>	foreach (DialogueSystem.ItemInfo itemInfo in GetItems()) {<nl>		if (itemInfo.Name != '') results -= 1;<nl>	}<nl>  return results;<nl>}<nl><nl>void SetStructureToPrivate() {<nl>   if (LocalStructure != null) {<nl>    LocalStructure?.SetFaction(FactionGroup.Player,Player.EntityId);<nl>  }<nl>}<nl><nl>void SetStructureToUCH() {<nl>   if (LocalStructure != null) {<nl>    int StructureID = LocalStructure.Entity.Id;<nl>    UnityEngine.Debug.Log(StructureID);<nl>    UnityEngine.Debug.Log(FactionGroup.UCH);<nl>    UnityEngine.Debug.Log(Player.EntityId);<nl>    LocalStructure.SetFaction(FactionGroup.UCH,LocalStructure.Entity.Id);<nl>  }<nl>}"

Properties.Functions: " void SelfDestructionCountdown() {<nl>  ILcd lcd = LocalStructure?.GetDevice<ILcd>('SDC');<nl>   SDCountdown = SDCountdown - 1;<nl>  System.TimeSpan time = System.TimeSpan.FromSeconds(SDCountdown);<nl> string str = time.ToString(@'mm\:ss');<nl> UnityEngine.Debug.Log('Self Destruction Countdown: ' + SDCountdown);<nl>   if (SDCountdown >= 0) {<nl>     if (SDCountdown <= 0) {<nl>       SetSignal('Boom', true);<nl>     }<nl>else {<nl>      CallLater(1,SelfDestructionCountdown);<nl>    }<nl>  }<nl>      if (lcd != null) {<nl>  lcd.SetText('<size=50%>Self Destruction Countdown:</size> <color=#cb1010>' + str + '</color>');<nl> }<nl> }"

Properties.Functions: "void CheckAndAddItem()<nl>    {<nl>        bool hasKeyCardCommon = false;<nl><nl>        foreach (DialogueSystem.ItemInfo itemInfo in GetItems())<nl>        {<nl>            if (itemInfo.Name == 'KeyCardCommon')<nl>            {<nl>                hasKeyCardCommon = true;<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl><nl>        if (!hasKeyCardCommon)<nl>        {<nl>            AddItem('KeyCardCommon', 1); <nl>        }<nl>    }"

Properties.Execute: "MasperonLogKyzzenArl = 1; SetNPCName('Kyzzen Arl, Officer of the guard')"

Properties.Functions: "// = Possible outcomes:<nl>// Too many failed hacking attempts OR too many successful hacking > Access denied (requires clearance key to unlock)<nl>// HackingFailed  <nl>// HackingFailed + stick destroyed or intact<nl>// Hacking successful + X reports gained<nl>// Hacking successful + X reports gained + stick destroyed<nl>//<nl>// = Chances: Military Console<nl>// KeyCardMilitary:  100%   (all Keycards)<nl>// Manual: 10%<nl>// FireStickRed: 50/10/20 (% success chance / % losing stick on success  /  % losing stick on failure)<nl>// FireStickBlue  30/20/40<nl>// FireStickGreen 20/40/80 <nl>//<nl>// = Available database entries (type):<nl>// == save in DB<nl>// ReportCount (dbplayerpoi_int)<nl>// HackingFailed (dbplayerpoi_int)   Values: 1; 3 = failed with fire stick lost (2 does not exist for consistency)<nl>//<nl>// == temporary on runtime (only?)<nl>// ClearanceKey ( string )        Holds the info which type of ClearanceKey was used for the Console-Output<nl>// FireStickDestroyed ( string )   Values: destroyed, intact   (see Hacking types Firestick values!)<nl>//<nl>// === Hacking types:<nl>// HackingKeyCardMilitary (int)    (Clearance Key)<nl>// HackingManually (int)<nl>// HackingFireStickRed (int)      Value: 1 = intact, 2 destroyed while success, 3 destroyed while failed<nl>// HackingFireStickGreen (int)<nl>// HackingFireStickBlue (int)<nl>//<nl>// === Items:<nl>// HackingReportMilitaryRawData (int)<nl>// HackingReportMilitaryScouting (int)<nl>// HackingReportMilitarySurveillance (int)<nl>// HackingReportMilitaryTroopMovement (int)<nl>// HackingReportMilitaryClassified (int)<nl>// <nl><nl>void HackingConsole()<nl>{<nl>    System.Random random = new System.Random();<nl>    int AccessGranted = random.Next(1, 101);   // Randomizer for access granted or not. Depending on hacking chances (see below) <nl>// Set AccessGranted based on HackingChance<nl>    if (HackingManually == 1 && AccessGranted >= 1 && AccessGranted <= 10)<nl>    {<nl>        HackingChance = 10;                  //  based on hacking method<nl>    }<nl>    else if (HackingKeyCardMilitary == 1)<nl>    {<nl>        HackingChance = 100;                 // always 100% when Clearance key is used!<nl>        HackingKeyCardMilitary = 2;                 // temporary set for the current dialogue session<nl>        RemoveItem('KeyCardMilitary', 1);<nl>        ClearanceKey = 'KeyCardMilitary'; <nl>    }<nl>// FireStickRed 50/10/20 = % success chance / % losing stick on success  /  % losing stick on failure<nl>    else if (HackingFireStickRed == 1 && AccessGranted >= 1 && AccessGranted <= 50)<nl>    {<nl>         HackingChance = 50;<nl>         LoseOnSuccess = 10;<nl>         LoseOnFailure = 20;<nl>         <nl>         int secondRandomNumber = random.Next(1, 101);<nl>         if (secondRandomNumber >= 1 && secondRandomNumber <= LoseOnSuccess)<nl>         {<nl>            RemoveItem('FireStickRed', 1);<nl>            HackingFireStickRed = 2;<nl>         }          <nl>    }<nl>// FireStickBlue 30/20/40<nl>    else if (HackingFireStickBlue == 1 && AccessGranted >= 1 && AccessGranted <= 30)<nl>    {<nl>         HackingChance = 30;<nl>         LoseOnSuccess = 20;<nl>         LoseOnFailure = 40;<nl><nl>         int secondRandomNumber = random.Next(1, 101);<nl>         if (secondRandomNumber >= 1 && secondRandomNumber <= LoseOnSuccess)<nl>         {<nl>            RemoveItem('FireStickBlue', 1);<nl>            HackingFireStickBlue = 2;<nl>         } <nl>    }<nl>// FireStickGreen 20/40/80<nl>    else if (HackingFireStickGreen == 1 && AccessGranted >= 1 && AccessGranted <= 20)<nl>    {<nl>         HackingChance = 20;<nl>         LoseOnSuccess = 40;<nl>         LoseOnFailure = 80;<nl>         int secondRandomNumber = random.Next(1, 101);<nl>         if (secondRandomNumber >= 1 && secondRandomNumber <= LoseOnSuccess)<nl>         {<nl>            RemoveItem('FireStickGreen', 1);<nl>            HackingFireStickGreen = 2;<nl>         }<nl>    }<nl>// calculate what happens when  hacking failed<nl>    else<nl>    {<nl>      if (HackingManually == 1 && AccessGranted > 10)<nl>      {<nl>         HackingFailed = 1;<nl>      }<nl>      else if (HackingFireStickRed == 1 && AccessGranted > 50)<nl>      {<nl>         HackingFailed = 1;<nl>         int thirdRandomNumber = random.Next(1, 101);<nl>         if (thirdRandomNumber >= 1 && thirdRandomNumber <= LoseOnFailure)<nl>         {<nl>            RemoveItem('FireStickRed', 1);<nl>            HackingFireStickRed = 3; <nl>         }<nl>      }<nl>      else if (HackingFireStickBlue == 1 && AccessGranted > 30)<nl>      {<nl>         HackingFailed = 1;<nl>         int thirdRandomNumber = random.Next(1, 101);<nl>         if (thirdRandomNumber >= 1 && thirdRandomNumber <= LoseOnFailure)<nl>         {<nl>            RemoveItem('FireStickBlue', 1);<nl>            HackingFireStickBlue = 3; <nl>         }<nl>      }<nl>      else if (HackingFireStickGreen == 1 && AccessGranted > 20)<nl>      {<nl>         HackingFailed = 1;<nl>         int thirdRandomNumber = random.Next(1, 101);<nl>         if (thirdRandomNumber >= 1 && thirdRandomNumber <= LoseOnFailure)<nl>         {<nl>            RemoveItem('FireStickGreen', 1);<nl>            HackingFireStickGreen = 3; <nl>         }<nl>      }<nl>      return; // Denies acces. Ends the function.<nl>    }<nl><nl>// Report Randomizer Funktion<nl>    while (ReportCount < 2)     //Max count based on console type!<nl>    {<nl>        int randomNumber = random.Next(1, 101);<nl><nl>        if (randomNumber >= 1 && randomNumber <= 20)<nl>        {<nl>            AddItem('ReportMilitaryRawData', 1);<nl>            ReportCount = ReportCount + 1;<nl>        }<nl>        else if (randomNumber >= 21 && randomNumber <= 40)<nl>        {<nl>            AddItem('ReportMilitaryScouting', 1);<nl>            ReportCount = ReportCount + 1;<nl>        }<nl>        else if (randomNumber >= 41 && randomNumber <= 60)<nl>        {<nl>            AddItem('ReportMilitarySurveillance', 1);<nl>            ReportCount = ReportCount + 1;<nl>        }<nl>        else if (randomNumber >= 61 && randomNumber <= 80)<nl>        {<nl>            AddItem('ReportMilitaryTroopMovement', 1);<nl>            ReportCount = ReportCount + 1;<nl>        }<nl>        else if (randomNumber >= 81 && randomNumber <= 100)<nl>        {<nl>            AddItem('ReportMilitaryClassified', 1);<nl>            ReportCount = ReportCount + 1;<nl>        }<nl>// roll the dice if more reports are available in this session<nl>        if (ReportCount >= 1)<nl>        {<nl>            int hackingRandomNumber = random.Next(1, 101);<nl>// stop reports drop when dice roll is higher than HackingChance value<nl>            if (hackingRandomNumber > HackingChance)<nl>            {<nl>                break;<nl>            }<nl>        }<nl>    }<nl>}<nl><nl>bool GetPOIFaction(string faction) {<nl>    var structureId = LocalStructure.Entity.Id;<nl>    var factionName = GetFaction(structureId);<nl><nl>    if (factionName == faction) {<nl>      UnityEngine.Debug.Log('faction');<nl>    	return true;<nl>    } else {<nl>      UnityEngine.Debug.Log('Wrong faction');<nl>      return false;<nl>    }<nl>}"

Properties.Execute: "if (HackingKeyCardMilitary == 2 && HackingFailed == 0) {HackingConsoleOutput = LocF('dialogue_e88auGG',ReportCount);}<nl>if (HackingManually == 1 && HackingFailed == 0) {HackingConsoleOutput = LocF('dialogue_e88auGG',ReportCount);}<nl>if (HackingFireStickRed == 1 && HackingFailed == 0) {HackingConsoleOutput = LocF('dialogue_e88auGG',ReportCount);}<nl>if (HackingFireStickBlue == 1 && HackingFailed == 0) {HackingConsoleOutput = LocF('dialogue_e88auGG',ReportCount);}<nl>if (HackingFireStickGreen == 1 && HackingFailed == 0) {HackingConsoleOutput = LocF('dialogue_e88auGG',ReportCount);}<nl> <nl>if (HackingFireStickRed == 2 && HackingFailed == 0) {HackingConsoleOutput = LocF('dialogue_C8K8Eee',ReportCount);}<nl>if (HackingFireStickBlue == 2 && HackingFailed == 0) {HackingConsoleOutput = LocF('dialogue_C8K8Eee',ReportCount);}<nl>if (HackingFireStickGreen == 2 && HackingFailed == 0) {HackingConsoleOutput = LocF('dialogue_C8K8Eee',ReportCount);}<nl><nl>if (HackingManually == 1 && HackingFailed == 1) {HackingConsoleOutput = Loc('dialogue_uaG0mWh');}<nl>if (HackingFireStickRed == 1 && HackingFailed == 1) {HackingConsoleOutput = Loc('dialogue_uaG0mWh');}<nl>if (HackingFireStickBlue == 1 && HackingFailed == 1) {HackingConsoleOutput = Loc('dialogue_uaG0mWh');}<nl>if (HackingFireStickGreen == 1 && HackingFailed == 1) {HackingConsoleOutput = Loc('dialogue_uaG0mWh');}<nl><nl>if (HackingFireStickRed == 3 && HackingFailed == 1) {HackingConsoleOutput = Loc('dialogue_SW8im7e');}<nl>if (HackingFireStickBlue == 3 && HackingFailed == 1) {HackingConsoleOutput = Loc('dialogue_SW8im7e');}<nl>if (HackingFireStickGreen == 3 && HackingFailed == 1) {HackingConsoleOutput = Loc('dialogue_SW8im7e');}"

"if (HackingFireStickRed == 2 || HackingFireStickRed == 3 || HackingFireStickBlue == 2 || HackingFireStickBlue == 3 || HackingFireStickGreen == 2 || HackingFireStickGreen == 3) { FireStickDestroyed = 'Destroyed';   } else{ FireStickDestroyed = 'Intact';} "
"HekatonARKRacetimeEnd = GetGameTimeInSec(); HekatonARKRaceCount = HekatonARKRaceCount +1; HekatonARKRacetime = ( HekatonARKRacetimeEnd - HekatonARKRacetimeStart ); HekatonARKPlayerRaceStatus = 4;"
